en_body:
whether the sky shines,
or rains...
the song of gladness still rises
from within the breast
and the lungs...
air purifies blood
the heart pumps life's sap
sustaining the voice...
whether morning,
or sunset
the waltz
of emotion
and thought,
still carries
the definition of
Existence...
Time is
blue
or violet to the utmost
though darkness conceals
the color-tones
of trees and branches,
it still reminds us
of tenderness,
of remembrance...
though Space is
horizon-far
concealing
our faces from each other
...all things still cherish
the movement of the heart's music
...only one reason is needed
for life to nurture
fragrant lips calling forth
a smile:
and the reason
becoming the force
to lift Life again
: is Love..!!

Only One Reason Is Needed
whether the sky shines,
or rains...
the song of gladness still rises
from within the breast
and the lungs...
air purifies blood
the heart pumps life's sap
sustaining the voice...
whether morning,
or sunset
the waltz
of emotion
and thought,
still carries
the definition of
Existence...
Time is
blue
or violet to the utmost
though darkness conceals
the color-tones
of trees and branches,
it still reminds us
of tenderness,
of remembrance...
though Space is
horizon-far
concealing
our faces from each other
...all things still cherish
the movement of the heart's music
...only one reason is needed
for life to nurture
fragrant lips calling forth
a smile:
and the reason
becoming the force
to lift Life again
: is Love..!!
